column1: # Generated from the built-in binding table by save_input_bindings_file;
# loaded at startup (after which a USER_CONF_DIR copy is loaded and wins).
# Edit a row to remap a chord; set action to '-' to un-bind it.
# device key|wheel|button; code = X keysym / button number / up|down;
# mods 0 or ctrl|alt|shift|super joined by '+'; ctx canvas|graph|global;
# idle 1 = chord is skipped while the editor is busy.
